meta.title: The Race Against ISIS
meta.description: Hudson Institute’s Center for Religious Freedom hosted Dr. Alam Marogy for a presentation on the current situation in Iraq and her foundation’s efforts to train clergy from Middle Eastern Churches to protect and preserve ancient Church documents and chronicle contemporary events and human rights abuses. Nina Shea, Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Religious Freedom at Hudson Institute, moderated the event. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
